## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run check` locally
- [ ] I added/updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] I updated docs (`README.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, or `RELEASE-NOTES.md`) as needed
- [ ] I kept changes focused and avoided unrelated edits
- [ ] If this is breaking, I clearly documented migration impact
